about.title: About Me
about.intro: Hey, I'm Sagdi. I went from Automobile Engineering through Dev & Design to Product Management. That weird path is why I build things to learn.
about.collects: This space collects what I build, think and notice, a mix of:
about.philosophical: figuring myself out, going deep, questioning the world
about.craft: product management, systems thinking, leadership & empathy.
about.reflection: journaling, photography, reflection and physical training.

pilot.description: AI-powered momentum tracker for professionals struggling with cognitive overload. Uses AI to analyze your goals and create personalized 4-week tracking cycles focused on energy and momentum over time-based productivity. Full-stack Next.js app.
pilot.imageAlt: ReguSelf app interface showing AI-powered goal analysis and tracking features

guide.description: A comprehensive, practical resource for aspiring and experienced product managers. Covers core PM concepts, frameworks, and real-world applications to help you excel in product management roles.
guide.imageAlt: The Ultimate Guide to Product Management resource preview
